text:
illness, exacerbation or injury. CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the patient's ability for self care prior to the current illness, exacerbation or injury. 1 = Dependent - A helper completed the activities for the patient. 
2 = Needed Some Help - Patient needed partial assistance from another person to complete activities.
3 = Independent - Patient completed the activities by him/herself, with or without an assistive device, with no assistance from a helper.
8 = Unknown 
9 = Not
